PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels' -ErrorAction Stop\).tunnels | Select-Object name,public_url,@{n='forwards_to';e={$_.config.addr}} | Format-List } catch { "Could not reach ngrok local API \(4040\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Admin\\WebstormProjects\\social-analytics\\.claude\\settings.local.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; "VALID JSON" } catch { "INVALID: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(awk '/async def stream_digest/,/^@router|^async def|^def / {print NR": "$0}' backend/app/ai/router.py)

PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\Admin\\WebstormProjects\\social-analytics\\backend; $py = Get-Command py,python3,python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($py\) { & $py.Source -m py_compile app/instagram/router.py; if \($?\) { "py_compile OK \($\($py.Name\)\)" } } else { "no python interpreter found on PATH" })
